creator: dbader@eece.unm.edu
text:
Argonne National Labs has released a new patch for mpich-1.1.1
	(patch file number 3923 from
	ftp://ftp.mcs.anl.gov/pub/mpi/patch/1.1.1)
	This patch modifies six (6) files in the distribution, and I have
	modified these to the 6 ports/patch files: patch-a[efghij]
	included below,	to be placed in /usr/ports/net/mpich/patches

Fix: 

---

Dept of Electrical and Computer Engineering     FAX:    505-277-1439
